description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, clad in white horizontal siding and featuring black shutters on its large, multi-pane windows. The front facade includes a covered porch area with outdoor seating, bordered by a low hedge and a black metal gate. The roof is flat, and the entry door is accented with a round window above it. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms with modern furnishings and light-colored walls. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, providing ample natural light. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with black shutters, a flat roof, and a covered front porch bordered by hedges and a gate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with seating, symmetrical windows with black shutters, and a hedge-lined yard.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the porch, a single side window, and the continuation of the hedge and gate.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three large windows with black shutters and a clear view of the interior room layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows, one smaller and one larger, and a partial view of the porch and hedge.
